2606.09556.title: AI Scientists Are Only as Good as Their Evidence: A Stratified Ablation of Proprietary Data and Reasoning Skills in Drug-Asset Valuation
2606.09556.paper_summary: AI Scientist agents are often evaluated as if capability were mainly a function of model quality, prompting, or reasoning scaffolds. We test a different hypothesis in drug-asset valuation: for knowledge-intensive scientific decisions, the limiting factor is often the evidence substrate the agent can access. We run a controlled three-arm ablation on a production valuation agent: A is a plain web-only LLM analyst, B adds public structured tools plus a 14-dimension valuation playbook, verifier, objectivity policy and red-team, and C adds the proprietary Noah AI corpus of curated pipeline, trial and deal intelligence. Across a 13-asset stratified benchmark, B improves calibration and audit discipline: tier-in-range accuracy rises from 0.80 to 0.89 and objectivity from 3.16 to 3.30. But B does not remove the factual ceiling. Under capability-superset accounting, A and B recover only 0.25 and 0.38 of the curated gold competitive record, while C recovers 0.96; on the curated long-tail subset, C reaches 0.93 vs. 0.26/0.30. Raw blind-panel decision quality is similar for A and B (7.01 vs. 6.96), so we introduce completeness-aware decision utility: informed decision-quality = decision-quality x gold-coverage. On this metric, C reaches 7.43 vs. 1.76/2.57 for A/B. Even a perfect non-proprietary-data report would be capped at 3.83 by B's coverage. The result is not that reasoning scaffolds are unimportant; they improve calibration and discipline. Rather, proprietary evidence sets the upper bound of what the AI Scientist can know and therefore decide.
2606.09556.paper_summary_zh: AI 科學家代理通常被評估為能力主要是模型質量、提示或推理支架的函數。我們在藥物資產估值中測試一個不同的假設：對於知識密集型的科學決策，限制因素通常是代理可以訪問的證據基礎。我們對一個生產估值代理進行了受控的三臂消融實驗：A 是一個純網絡的 LLM 分析師，B 增加了公共結構化工具以及一個 14 維的估值手冊、驗證者、客觀性政策和紅隊，而 C 則增加了專有的 Noah AI 精選管道、試驗和交易智能。 在一個 13 資產的分層基準中，B 改善了校準和審計紀律：範疇內準確度從 0.80 上升到 0.89，客觀性從 3.16 上升到 3.30。但 B 並未消除事實上限。在能力超集會計下，A 和 B 只恢復了 0.25 和 0.38 的精選黃金競爭記錄，而 C 恢復了 0.96；在精選的長尾子集上，C 達到 0.93，對比 A/B 的 0.26/0.30。A 和 B 的原始盲評決策質量相似（7.01 對 6.96），因此我們引入了考慮完整性的決策效用：知情決策質量 = 決策質量 x 黃金覆蓋率。在這一指標上，C 達到 7.43，而 A/B 則為 1.76/2.57。即使是一份完美的非專有數據報告，也會因為 B 的覆蓋率而被限制在 3.83。結果並不是推理支架不重要；它們改善了校準和紀律。相反，專有證據設置了 AI 科學家所能知道的上限，因此也決定了他們的決策。
2606.09556.author: Yinan Wang et.al.
